blended.narrative: Sommet Saint-Sauveur is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 26 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: light rain showers, highs of 45°F.
Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
